name: pr_bd_g4
drl:
rule "W"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    T1($x : f1)
    accumulate(T0(f0 == "zz"); $n : count())
then
end
rule "R2"
salience 2
agenda-group "ga"
when
    T0()
then
    insert(new T1(7.0, 3.0, true, false));
end
rule "R5"
when
    T1($y : f2)
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
end
_finding: faithful-timing GUARD: the receiver W is DECLARED BEFORE the inserter R2 but sits at LOWER salience. A decl-order peek walk would still materialize W early; Drools' salience-ordered peek stops at R2 and leaves W lazy. Discriminates pick-order vs decl-order implementations.
